CustomField.description: Used by the Record Trigger - Lab Order - Set Scheduled Date to Be Submitted to Lab flow for the purpose of delaying the submission of the Lab Order to the Lab
CustomField.inlineHelpText: When this is checked the lab order schedule will be set to 5 minutes regardless of any other checks. To check the actual formula leave this checkbox unchecked.
CustomField.label: Scheduled Labs - Run In Test
